page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.24xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.g9a family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor built on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 96 dedicated physical cores running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 96 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. For network connectivity, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 48 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput communication for distributed environments. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring high parallel processing capabilities and balanced memory allocation without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. Appropriate workloads include large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, distributed caching, and general-purpose batch processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.24xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9T25 processor on the x86_64 architecture. It features 96 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, providing 96 vCPUs without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 48 Gbps. This configuration is designed for workloads that demand high parallel compute capacity and balanced memory resources, such as enterprise application hosting, large-scale web serving, and distributed batch processing.

tagline: A dedicated 96-core AMD EPYC platform with balanced memory and high-speed networking for demanding general-purpose enterprise workloads.

384.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
48 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
